surface_verification.justification: Pure compliance renderer/scorer change (dashboard + test-evidence markdown generators + a new pure scoring lib). No product web/api/cli/UI/store surface is introduced or changed; the dashboard is a static tracked .md. Verified by the full shipwright-compliance suite (720 passed) plus a real-data render probe of the dashboard top block.

degraded: Full monorepo + shared/tests suites delegated to CI ci.yml. This change touches only plugins/shipwright-compliance/scripts/lib + tests + docs/guide.md; local gate = the compliance plugin suite (720 passed) + pinned-ruff clean.
Security dimension rendered n/a (not scored): the local securityreports/latest.md is stale (2026-04-28) + test-fixture-FP-laden; authoritative posture = the CI security gate, ingested later by AR-10.
Change-reconciliation dimension rendered n/a: per-FR behavior impact is not yet persisted on events (BP-2). Grader consumes it the moment BP-2 lands; no scorer change.

behaviors.behavior: Weighted aggregate over measurable dims; all-green -> A
n/a dimensions excluded from the weighted denominator
All-n/a -> Not Gradeable, never an unearned F
FR-tag freeze caps the grade; real shipwright case -> B
Verdict maps to the band label (no free-text drift)
Displayed integer can never contradict the letter band
Reconciliation lights up when measurable (BP-2 seam)
AR-02 resolver: latest FULL suite, skips trailing 0/0 + subset, most-recent-not-max
AR-02 dashboard headline reads the latest full suite (no 0/0)
AR-02 test-evidence summary uses the shared resolver
AR-03 no dead audit link + inline consistency-audit summary
